title: mentha sylvestris var. glabrata
intro: Mentha sylvestris var. glabrata, also known as field mint or wild mint, is a variant of the peppermint plant, native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its smooth leaves and compact growth habit. The plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha sylvestris var. glabrata include alleviating digestive issues, relieving headaches and fever, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support respiratory health and calm digestive issues.
